title: UAE, oasis for business and partying, faces war
summary_full: Iranian airstrikes have shaken Persian Gulf countries, undermining their reputations as havens of wealth and stability and forcing them to take sides in a war they opposed.
summary_public: Iranian airstrikes have shaken Persian Gulf countries, undermining their reputations as havens of wealth and stability and forcing them to take sides in a war they opposed.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian airstrikes have shaken Persian Gulf countries
